creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: garga
Date: Fri Sep 28 11:20:30 UTC 2018
New revision: 480853
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/480853

Log:
  Update security/sshguard to 2.2.0

  While here, break some long lines, Use INSTALL_DATA to install sample config
  file since it's not supposed to be changed and re-generate patches using
  `make makepatch`

  PR:		230861
  Approved by:	maintainer timeout (> 1 month)
  Obtained from:	pfSense
  Sponsored by:	Rubicon Communications, LLC (Netgate)

Changes:
  head/security/sshguard/Makefile
  head/security/sshguard/distinfo
  head/security/sshguard/files/patch-examples-sshguard.conf.sample
  head/security/sshguard/files/patch-src-sshguard.in
